name: keymouse-studio
description: KeyMouse Studio — Windows 键鼠自动化工具
author: Geo-ff

scripts.check:main: node --check main.mjs && node --check app-menu.mjs && node --check auto-updater.mjs && node --check sidecar-manager.mjs && node --check global-hotkeys.mjs && node --check constants.mjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:sidecar && electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
